name: bizbrain-ai
description: BizBrain AI - Your Intelligent Business Copilot

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix frontend --legacy-peer-deps
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build-backend: npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build-all: npm run build-backend && npm run build-frontend
scripts.db-setup: npm run prisma:db-push --prefix backend && npm run prisma:seed --prefix backend
